user_query: I'm planning a surprise birthday party for my best friend and I need some ideas for food and desserts.

TaskList.description: Research and compile a list of popular chicken dishes suitable for a birthday party.
Research and compile a list of popular desserts that would be suitable for a birthday party.
Research and compile a list of popular pizza options that can cater to a birthday party.
Consolidate the lists from the previous tasks into a final menu for the party.
